title: Cosmos SDK cosmos.base.node Schemas
description: JSON Schema definitions for the cosmos.base.node module of the Cosmos SDK gRPC-gateway REST API.

cosmos.base.node.v1beta1.ConfigResponse.description: ConfigResponse defines the response structure for the Config gRPC query.

earliestStoreHeight.title: earliest block height available in the store

appHash.title: app hash of the current block

validatorHash.title: validator hash provided by the consensus header

cosmos.base.node.v1beta1.StatusResponse.description: StateResponse defines the response structure for the status of a node.
